description: Computer Associates (CA) eTrust Security Command Center 1.0 and r8 up to SP1 CR2, and eTrust Audit 1.5 and r8, allows remote attackers to spoof alerts and conduct replay attacks by invoking eTSAPISend.exe with the desired arguments.
